treatment_information.specific_treatment: ORIF Right distal periprosthetic femur fracture

treatment_timeline.event: ORIF surgery performed for right distal periprosthetic femur fracture
Start of Enoxaparin Sodium 40 mg SC daily for 4 weeks post-operatively to prevent blood clots
Discharge with instructions for pain and constipation management
Follow up scheduled in Trauma Clinic for evaluation

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow up with Dr. ___ in the Trauma Clinic ___ days post-operation for evaluation; follow up with primary care doctor within ___ weeks
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Expected to improve over the first few days to week
